metadata.note: Standalone atomic (no theater), Archetype B bilateral. Grounded against 365d of ASIA-SOUTHEAST coverage 2026-07-17. HARD CONSTRAINT: no usable country centroid -- ASIA-PACIFIC-THAILAND is empty (0 titles, ASEAN centroid bug) and Cambodia has NO centroid at all; the only populated centroid is the 11-country ASIA-SOUTHEAST bucket, so primary_target is unavailable (null anyway for a bilateral) and gating is PURE ALIAS. Bare 'Cambodia'/'Cambodian' are therefore EXCLUDED: within ASIA-SOUTHEAST they would sweep in the large Cambodia scam-centre / transnational-crime story (a separate FN, out of scope) plus Cambodia-China diplomacy and domestic news -- of ~74 Cambodia-mention titles/180d only ~20 are this border conflict. Precision over recall (spec rule 4, 1a Cuba case): anchored on the country-pair compound (the live workhorse, 8 hits), the MOU43/44 maritime framework (4), the Cambodian PM, and border toponyms. The famous temple toponyms (Preah Vihear/Ta Moan) return 0 in the current quiet window -- the kinetic phase predates the data -- but are kept so recall scales automatically when clashes resume. EXCLUDED with cause: bare 'Anutin' (Thai PM, 88 hits, ~all Thai domestic politics not the conflict), bare 'Chong ' (matched 'Enchong Dee'), bare 'demarcation'/'ceasefire'/'border' (generic, would leak across ASEAN), bare 'UNCLOS' (SCS + Hormuz), 'Surin'/'Ubon' (generic Thai provinces).

bundle.term: Country-pair compound (the live workhorse anchor; hyphen AND en-dash forms)
Disputed border sites and temples (fire on escalation)
Maritime / Gulf of Thailand overlapping-claims dimension
Boundary mechanisms (full names only; bare 'demarcation' leaks to South Asia LAC)
Cambodian principal (own-side actor; 'Hun Sen' dropped -- leaked Cambodia-China Beijing visits)
Border provinces adjacent to the clash line
